# Local Agent Wizard

Local Agent Wizard is a static web tool for generating local AI Agent configurations.

## Core Pages

- Home: https://localagentwizard.com/
- Wizard: https://localagentwizard.com/local-agent-wizard.html
- Error Diagnosis: https://localagentwizard.com/diagnose.html
- Guides: https://localagentwizard.com/guides/
- Templates: https://localagentwizard.com/templates.html
- Pricing: https://localagentwizard.com/pricing.html
- Integrations: https://localagentwizard.com/integrations.html

## What This Site Helps With

- Recommending local AI models based on RAM/VRAM
- Generating Ollama and Qwen-Agent setup commands
- Creating Cursor MCP configuration JSON
- Producing Loop Engineering playbooks
- Diagnosing common Ollama, MCP, and local agent errors

## Useful Guides

- Mac local AI Agent setup: https://localagentwizard.com/guides/mac-local-agent.html
- Windows NVIDIA local AI Agent setup: https://localagentwizard.com/guides/windows-nvidia-agent.html
- Cursor MCP configuration: https://localagentwizard.com/guides/cursor-mcp-config.html
- Ollama error fixes: https://localagentwizard.com/guides/ollama-errors.html
- Model memory guide: https://localagentwizard.com/guides/model-memory-guide.html

## Privacy

The current version runs client-side. Generated configurations, comments, and diagnostics are not uploaded by default.
